message: 🌱 Add strimzi: kafka-exporter "Cannot get describe groups" mission (#639)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,79 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "strimzi-2480-kafka-exporter-cannot-get-describe-groups",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "strimzi: kafka-exporter \"Cannot get describe groups\"",
+    "description": "kafka-exporter \"Cannot get describe groups\". This issue affects 2+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify strimzi troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your strimzi deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n strimzi -l app.kubernetes.io/name=strimzi\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=strimzi -n strimzi --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review strimzi configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant strimzi configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n strimzi -l app.kubernetes.io/name=strimzi\nkubectl get configmap -n strimzi -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=strimzi\n```\nMy Kafka exporter can't connect to the broker and can't describe groups. So I have **missing metrics** in my prometheus instance."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for kafka-exporter \"Cannot get describe groups\"",
+        "description": "This PR updates the Kafka Exporter to a custom version based on the upstream 1.3.1. \n\nThis should fix several issues reported with it: closes #4561 and Closes #2480.\n```yaml\ntime=\"2020-01-30T11:22:53Z\" level=error msg=\"Cannot get describe groups: kafka: broker not connected\" source=\"kafka_exporter.go:373\"\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Upgrade strimzi to include the fix",
+        "description": "If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade strimzi:\n```bash\nhelm repo update\nhelm upgrade strimzi strimzi/strimzi --namespace strimzi\n```\nVerify the upgrade:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n strimzi\nhelm list -n strimzi\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm kafka-exporter \"Cannot get describe groups\" is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=strimzi -n strimzi --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n strimzi --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "This PR updates the Kafka Exporter to a custom version based on the upstream 1.3.1. \n\nThis should fix several issues reported with it: closes #4561 and Closes #2480.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "time=\"2020-01-30T11:22:53Z\" level=error msg=\"Cannot get describe groups: kafka: broker not connected\" source=\"kafka_exporter.go:373\""
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "strimzi",
+      "incubating",
+      "storage",
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "strimzi"
+    ],

+    "issueTypes": [
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],

+      "issue": "https://github.com/strimzi/strimzi-kafka-operator/issues/2480",

+    },
